subject: Accountancy

chapters.title: Introduction to Accounting
chapters.summary: Nature and purpose of accounting, accounting concepts and conventions, double-entry system, types of accounts.

aiEnhancementLesson.title: From Double-Entry Bookkeeping to AI Accounting & GST Automation
aiEnhancementLesson.content: Board Level: Accounting = art of recording, classifying, summarising financial transactions. Concepts: entity, going concern, accrual, conservatism. Double-entry: every debit has equal credit. Rules: Personal (Dr=receiver, Cr=giver), Real (Dr=what comes in), Nominal (Dr=expenses/losses). CA Bridge: Journal, ledger, trial balance sequence. Tally ERP fundamentals. Intelligence Age: Tally Solutions (Bengaluru-based) serves 7 million businesses with AI-powered accounting — automating your double-entry system and GST filing. India's GST AI (GSTN system) processes 2 crore invoices daily, automatically checking debit-credit matching. Intuit's TurboTax AI does tax returns using your accounting rules. Zerodha's Kite app automatically calculates P&L using your nominal account debit-credit rules. Your chapter IS the foundation of India's entire digital accounting infrastructure.
aiEnhancementLesson.practicalAddOn: Pass journal entries for: (1) Started business with ₹50,000 cash. (2) Bought goods for ₹20,000 cash. (3) Sold goods for ₹30,000 on credit. For each: identify accounts (Personal/Real/Nominal), apply rule (Dr/Cr), and post to T-accounts. Verify: total debits = total credits in all entries.

quiz.question: When goods are sold on credit, the journal entry is:

feedback.correct: Correct! Credit sale: Debtors Account Dr. (personal account, receiver gets goods → Dr.). Sales Account Cr. (nominal account, revenue earned → Cr.).
feedback.incorrect: Credit sale: Debtors A/c Dr (receiver of goods — personal account rule) / Sales A/c Cr (income — nominal account rule). No cash received yet.
feedback.intelligenceAgeHint: Every credit sale on Amazon/Flipkart creates this exact journal entry in their ERP system — AI accounting software (SAP, Oracle Financials) processes millions of these entries per second.

quiz.question: [CA Level] Which accounting concept requires recording expenses in the period they are incurred (not when paid)?

feedback.correct: Correct! Accrual concept: recognise revenue when earned and expenses when incurred, regardless of cash flow. This matches with 'matching concept' (match revenues with related expenses in same period).
feedback.incorrect: Accrual concept: record transactions when they occur (not when cash changes hands). Salary for March paid in April is recorded as March expense (accrued liability).
feedback.intelligenceAgeHint: India's Companies Act mandates accrual-based accounting for all listed companies. RoC's AI audit system flags companies that don't follow accrual accounting — your concept is legally enforced.

quiz.question: [Intelligence Age] Tally's AI auto-reconciles bank statements with books. If bank shows ₹5,00,000 balance but Tally shows ₹4,80,000, the difference is ₹20,000. Which is most likely cause?
options: Cheques issued but not yet presented for payment (outstanding cheques)

feedback.correct: Correct! Outstanding cheques: business issued cheques (recorded in books) but they haven't been presented at bank yet → bank balance higher than book balance. Common bank reconciliation item.
feedback.incorrect: Book balance < Bank balance by ₹20,000 → usually means cheques issued by firm not yet cleared at bank (outstanding cheques) or bank has credited something not yet recorded in books.
feedback.intelligenceAgeHint: Tally's AI bank reconciliation module automatically identifies outstanding cheques, direct bank deposits, and errors — applying your bank reconciliation statement logic at million-transaction scale for Indian businesses.

competitivePlugin.caEdge: CA Foundation: Master the 'Golden Rules': Personal (Dr Receiver, Cr Giver), Real (Dr what comes in, Cr what goes out), Nominal (Dr expenses/losses, Cr income/gains). These rules ARE CA Foundation accounting.
competitivePlugin.calculationHack: Trial balance check: sum of all Dr balances = sum of all Cr balances. If not equal, there's an error. Common errors: wrong-side posting, omission, arithmetic mistakes.
competitivePlugin.mnemonicAgent: RPN for accounting rules: Real account (comes In=Dr, goes Out=Cr), Personal (Receiver=Dr, Giver=Cr), Nominal (expense/loss=Dr, income/gain=Cr). 'RPN — Real Personal Nominal — the three account types rule everything.'
